This harmless product-roadmap-item mentions rg-blue and rg-test in prose.
GUID 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555 and hex 11111111111111111111111111111111 have no key context.
Invoice number 123456789012 is harmless billing prose.
Hyphenated product names blue-green-widget and open-source-project stay visible.
Ordinary domain example.com and storage.googleapis.com docs reference without bucket path stay visible.
